personal.preferred_title: Vice President Data Engineer | Python, SQL, ETL/ELT & Financial Services Data Integration

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience, including recent Citi experience building production data pipelines, automation, reporting, and analytics platforms in regulated financial-services environments. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PL/SQL, ETL/ELT design, data warehousing, reconciliation, data quality, performance tuning, release support, and operational reliability. Experienced partnering with architecture, application, analytics, and business teams to turn complex data requirements into secure, governed, production-ready data solutions.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and operated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable, governed data workflows used for analytics and operational reporting.

Designed optimized Oracle schemas and reporting structures for historical retention, capacity analytics, and executive reporting, applying SQL tuning, partitioning concepts, reconciliation, and data quality validation.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, and Amazon Redshift workloads to support scalable forecasting, analytics, and downstream consumption.
Developed Python automation utilities for data loads, validation, error handling, reporting, and operational tooling, with attention to logging, repeatability, and production support handoff.
Integrated disparate monitoring and application data feeds including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified Oracle reporting datasets for technical and business stakeholders.
Supported production reliability through incident analysis, root-cause investigation, release coordination, runbook-style documentation, and continuous improvement of data pipeline execution.
Implemented forecasting and analytics pipelines using Prophet, scikit-learn, PySpark, and Streamlit to surface capacity risks and operational insights for senior stakeholders.
Worked in a regulated banking environment with strong attention to access controls, data governance, auditability, retention, and secure handling of sensitive enterprise data.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data for critical hospitality systems, converting performance telemetry into actionable analytics and optimization recommendations.
Led the FAST project to data-mine real-user and synthetic monitoring metrics, producing performance insights adopted by engineering teams for customer-facing systems.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing, application behavior, and performance bottlenecks across pre-production and production-like workflows.
Implemented end-user monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving visibility into application health, service behavior, and operational risk.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, managing enterprise monitoring environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, reducing manual weekly exports and improving repeatability of operational analytics.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and documentation standards used by client engineering and operations teams to support production stability and release readiness.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic and database teams to investigate performance bottlenecks and communicate findings clearly across technical and non-technical audiences.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, validating data correctness and performance across phased cutover activities.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing and database access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and support production cutover confidence.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing and integration components across telecom invoicing, settlement, reporting, and customer management workflows.
Delivered performance enhancements in billing processes, improving throughput and database performance while reducing memory usage in production-critical systems.
Reverse-engineered and documented undocumented APIs and integration flows, enabling reliable interface development and long-term operational support.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, Java, C, C++, XML, JSON, YAML
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data integration, data warehousing, dimensional modeling, incremental loads, reconciliation, validation, data quality, data lineage concepts, schema evolution concepts, metadata management
skills.Financial Services Delivery: regulated enterprise environments, production support, release coordination, incident triage, auditability, controls, data governance, documentation, stakeholder alignment
skills.Cloud & Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, Lambda concepts, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Snowflake concepts, NoSQL concepts
skills.Automation & Reliability: Python automation, logging, error handling, operational tooling, runbooks, root-cause analysis, performance tuning, query optimization, monitoring and alerting concepts
skills.ETL / ELT Tooling Context: custom Python/SQL ETL frameworks, AWS Glue, Airflow; transferable enterprise ETL concepts for Informatica, DataStage, SSIS, Talend, Azure Data Factory, Matillion and dbt
skills.Delivery Practices: Agile/Scrum/Kanban, Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, automated testing concepts, technical documentation, design reviews, cross-team collaboration
skills.Observability / Analytics: BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Wily, AppDynamics, Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetics, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, operational reporting

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts to support governed data access, ETL processing, and analytics workflows. The project emphasizes small-file mitigation, Parquet-based storage, SQL access patterns, and repeatable data engineering design.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics pipeline for enterprise telemetry, using Prophet and scikit-learn models with Streamlit reporting to support capacity planning, risk identification, and executive insights.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end AI-assisted data pipeline that performs semantic duplicate detection, structured extraction, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking using Python, embeddings, and LLM APIs.
